Concept: Non-Active Battery Materials

Creator

Description

This is the non-active battery materials which can include sheet metal, computer chips, wires, and others, depending on if cells or modules are shredded.

Usage List:

  • Appears as Non-Active Battery Materials in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Non-Active Battery Materials in Diagram Pretreat Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Non-Active Battery Materials in Diagram Mechanically/Chemically Pretreat Material in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
